MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Matthew F. Quint, Esq. of WILSON & QUINT 288-6700, for defendants PLANTAGENET CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC, Plantagenet Capital Fund, LP, Plantagenet Capital Fund II, LLP, Plantagenet capital America, LLC and C. Derek Anderson, moving For Relief From Order Striking Filing Due To Invalid Check

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Counsel presented his argument and THE COURT vacated ITS TENTATIVE RULING and granted DEFENDANT PLANTAGENET CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, LLC, Plantagenet Capital Fund, LP, Plantagenet Capital Fund II, LLP, Plantagenet capital America, LLC and C. Derek Anderson's Motion For Relief From Order Striking Filing Due To Invalid Check. Prevailing party is to prepare an order and to comply with CCP 391. (KMM/301) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
